\tzpentry{ID4781}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4781 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathbf{B}(t) = \\int_0^{t} \\dot{\\mathbf{B}}_{\\text{ramp}} dt \\implies \\mathbf{B}_{\\text{target}} \\approx 0.1 \\text{ Tesla}\n\\end{equation}
